titleStmt.title: The American Ambassador to the Secretary of State..

div.head: The American Ambassador to the Secretary of State .
div.p: Accompanying the delegation are the French journalists M. Gaston Deschamps, representing “Le Temps,” and M. Régis Gignoux, representing “Figaro.”
I consider it very desirable and important that every possible official courtesy be shown to this delegation during their short stay in America. Their itinerary can be had from the French Ambassador.
